summary: Invoice Document Generation API Testing Complete. All 24 backend tests passed. Verified: GET /api/documents/available-invoices/7370 returns has_payer=true with payer 'ФОП Мельник...' and 2 available_types (invoice-payment, service-act). Order 7300 correctly returns has_payer=false with empty available_types. Invoice-payment and service-act HTML previews contain correct parties (Николенко as supplier, Мельник as buyer), amount '1 100,00', 'Прокат декору', and proper signatures section with 'ЗАТВЕРДЖУЮ', 'Від Виконавця', 'Від Замовника'.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/documents/available-invoices/{order_id} correctly detects payer via _get_order_payer() with 3-level fallback
✅ Payer auto-detection works via: orders.payer_profile_id → client_payer_links (is_default) → customer_name COLLATE match
✅ available_types correctly returns invoice-payment and service-act for FOP payer type
✅ GET /api/documents/invoice-payment/{order_id}/preview returns valid HTML with correct parties
✅ GET /api/documents/service-act/{order_id}/preview returns valid HTML with ЗАТВЕРДЖУЮ header and signatures
✅ Both endpoints return 400 error for orders without payer (correct error handling)
✅ Amount formatting uses Ukrainian format with comma separator (1 100,00)
✅ Templates invoice_payment.html and service_act.html are properly structured

test_data_used.ORDER_WITH_PAYER: 7370 (Христина Мулярчук - has ФОП Мельник Олександр Анатолійович as payer)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing orders 7370 and 7300 for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice document generation endpoints fully tested. available-invoices correctly detects payers via 3-level fallback. invoice-payment and service-act generate valid HTML with parties, amounts, and signatures. Order 7370 has payer ФОП Мельник (auto-detected via customer_name match). Order 7300 has no payer. Amount displayed is 1 100,00 UAH.
